_comments.AzureWebJobsStorage: Connection string to Azure Storage account. Use 'UseDevelopmentStorage=true' for local Azurite emulator.
_comments.TicketApiUrl: URL to fetch Celtic FC ticket information. Default value should work.
_comments.AzureCommunicationServicesConnectionStri: Connection string from Azure Communication Services resource. Found in Azure Portal > Your ACS resource > Keys.
_comments.NotificationEmailFrom: The sender email address. Must be a verified domain in Azure Communication Services.
_comments.NotificationEmailTo: The recipient email address where ticket notifications will be sent.
